digest.en: Iran says the Strait of Hormuz will not return to its previous state. US-Israel-Iran ceasefire talks are ongoing with Iranian negotiators set to return to Pakistan to revive truce talks. Islamabad reopened after US-Iran talks failed to materialize.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी पूर्व राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप की डिनर पार्टी में फायरिंग की घटना सामने आई है। घटना के बाद दुनिया के नेताओं ने अपनी प्रतिक्रियाएं दी हैं। भारत और पाकिस्तान समेत कई देशों के नेताओं ने इस घटना की निंदा की है।

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'Hormuz will not return to previous state', Iran
articles.summary: Donald Trump said a shooting incident will not deter him from winning in Iran. He made the statement amid ceasefire talks. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Shooting incident won't deter me from win in Iran war, says Trump The Times of India.

articles.title: Marathon-Kenya's Sawe becomes first man to run marathon under two hours to win in London
articles.summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla arrived in the US for a four-day state visit, amid a tense transatlantic relationship. The royal couple's visit comes as the US and UK face disagreements under President Trump.

articles.title: Philippines says two US citizens among 19 killed in raid
articles.summary: Two US citizens, Lyle Prijoles and Kai Dana-Rene Sorem, were killed in a raid in Negros Occidental province. The two Americans, identified as Lyle Prijoles and Kai Dana-Rene Sorem, arrived in Negros Occidental province about a month before they were killed, officials said in a statement late on Saturday (Apr 25).

articles.title: Iranian Negotiators Set to Return to Pakistan to Try to Revive Truce Talks
articles.summary: Iranian negotiators are set to return to Pakistan to revive truce talks. The move follows President Trump's decision to call off a trip by his top advisers, leaving the outcome of the negotiations uncertain.

articles.title: Islamabad Reopens After U.S.-Iran Talks Fail to Materialize
articles.summary: Islamabad reopened after US-Iran talks failed to materialize. The city was locked down in anticipation of the talks, but officials now say they will not proceed. Officials had locked the city down, anticipating talks between U. S.

articles.title: King Charles U.S. visit comes at tense moment in transatlantic relationship
articles.summary: Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old tutor and computer programmer, has been accused of shooting at the White House correspondents' dinner. Allen, a 2017 mechanical engineering graduate from Caltech, is facing charges.

articles.title: Trump WH correspondents' dinner shooting LIVE: Accused is a tutor, computer programmer from
articles.summary: Pakistan reopened Islamabad after US-Iran talks did not happen. The city was locked down in anticipation of the talks, but officials now say they will not proceed, leaving business owners frustrated.

articles.title: Yemen’s landmine crisis endures despite truce and de-mining efforts
articles.summary: Landmines in Yemen continue to kill and maim despite ceasefire efforts. De-mining initiatives are ongoing. Landmines in Yemen continue to kill and maim, even amid ceasefire efforts and ongoing de-mining initiatives.

articles.title: "Army Doesn't Get Business": US Soldier Accused Of Betting On Maduro Operation
articles.summary: Gannon Ken Van Dyke, a US soldier, was part of the operation to capture Maduro in January. He is accused of betting on the operation. Gannon Ken Van Dyke was part of the operation to capture Maduro in January.

articles.title: Swiss International says five injured after flight aborts takeoff in India
articles.summary: Swiss International flight aborts takeoff in India, five injured. The incident occurred during takeoff. Swiss International says five injured after flight aborts takeoff in India.

articles.title: Trump Was Going To "Rip It" With Media, Then Literal Shots Were Fired
articles.summary: Trump entered the Hilton with an animus towards the media. Shots were fired during the incident. Trump entered the Hilton with the weight of an animus with the media seen throughout his second term.

articles.title: U.S. Mint Buys Drug Cartel Gold and Sells It as ‘American’
articles.summary: The US Mint buys gold from various sources, including drug cartels, and sells it as American. As prices for the precious metal soar, the industry’s guardrails have broken down. U. S.

articles.title: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
articles.summary: Israel's President Isaac Herzog will not pardon Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. He will seek a plea deal instead. President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.

articles.title: Oman's Sultan meets Iran's Araghchi to discuss regional situation

articles.title: Armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups launched coordinated attacks across Mali, with clashes reported in the centre and north. Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

articles.summary: The White House Correspondents’ Dinner is an annual event. What is the White House Correspondents’ Dinner?

articles.title: Who is Cole Tomas Allen, suspect apprehended in connection to shooting in Washington
articles.summary: Cole Tomas Allen, 31, of Torrance, California, was identified as the shooting suspect. described by Trump as a “sick person”. was identified as Cole Tomas Allen, 31, of Torrance, California.

articles.title: China launches Pakistani satellite
articles.summary: China launched the Pakistani satellite PRSC-EO3 using a Long March-6 carrier rocket. The satellite named PRSC-EO3 was lifted off at 8:15 p. m. (Beijing Time) by a Long March-6 carrier rocket and successfully entered its planned orbit.

articles.title: Who is Cole Allen, the suspect in the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting?
articles.summary: Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old California resident, was identified as the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting suspect. The suspect arrested in the White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting has been identified as Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old California resident.

articles.title: U.S. lawmakers say violence has no place in the country
articles.summary: Democrat leader Ro Khanna said political violence is unacceptable in the US after a Secret Service agent was shot. My thoughts are with the brave Secret Service agent who was shot.

articles.title: Sri Lanka seeks investors for loss-making Mattala airport in Hambantota
articles.summary: Sri Lanka seeks investors for the loss-making Mattala airport, which India has shown interest in operating through a joint venture. India has in the past expressed interest to operate the airport in Mattala, which has made headlines as the ‘world’s emptiest airport’, including through a joint venture with a Russian company.

articles.title: पश्चिम एशिया का संघर्ष तेजी से एक ऐसे युद्ध का रूप लेता जा रहा है जिसे कोई नहीं जीत सकता
articles.summary: पश्चिम एशिया का संघर्ष एक ऐसे युद्ध का रूप ले रहा है जिसे कोई नहीं जीत सकता। इससे क्षेत्र में तनाव और अस्थिरता बढ़ रही है। पश्चिम एशिया का संघर्ष तेजी से एक ऐसे युद्ध का रूप लेता जा रहा है जिसे कोई नहीं जीत सकता ThePrint Hindi।

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।

articles.title: UN की डरावनी चेतावनी, दाने-दाने को मोहताज होंगे 1.1 करोड़ पाकिस्तानी? 10 देशों का बुरा हाल
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने चेतावनी दी है कि 1.1 करोड़ पाकिस्तानी लोगों को दाने-दाने के लिए संघर्ष करना पड़ सकता है। 10 देशों में खाद्य संकट की स्थिति बनी हुई है। यह जानकारी संयुक्त राष्ट्र की ओर से जारी की गई।

articles.title: यूरोपीय संघ एक बार फिर अमेरिका से टकराव की तैयारी में, संयुक्त राष्ट्र बनेगा अखाड़ा
articles.summary: यूरोपीय संघ अमेरिका के साथ टकराव की तैयारी कर रहा है। यह टकराव संयुक्त राष्ट्र में होगा। यूरोपीय संघ और अमेरिका के बीच मतभेद बढ़ रहे हैं। यह जानकारी विभिन्न स्रोतों से मिली है।

articles.title: युद्ध-संघर्ष... यूएन चार्टर में शांति स्थापना का जिक्र, विदेश मंत्री जयशंकर ने दुनिया के सामने रखी

articles.title: 'ट्रंप जब चाहेंगे तब खत्म होगा युद्ध, 3-5 दिन की डेडलाइन की खबरें गलत', पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष पर
articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा कि अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रम्प जब चाहेंगे तब पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष समाप्त होगा. व्हाइट हाउस ने 3-5 दिनों की समयसीमा की खबरों को गलत बताया. ट्रम्प की ओर से कोई आधिकारिक बयान नहीं आया है.

articles.title: युद्ध के लिए तैयार ट्रंप, ईरान ने दी चेतावनी- एक और नरक बना देंगे
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रम्प ने कहा कि वह युद्ध के लिए तैयार हैं. ईरान ने चेतावनी दी कि अगर अमेरिका ने हमला किया तो वह एक और नरक बना देंगे. अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है.
